seoTitle: Aranda vs Barton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Aranda and Barton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Aranda and Barton.
heading: Aranda vs Barton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Aranda, Australian Capital Territory and Barton, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Aranda has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Barton (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Aranda or Barton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Aranda has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Barton scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Aranda scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Barton scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Aranda or Barton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Aranda has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
